home_subtitle: Sort monsters into the right portals, build combos, and unlock skins.
shop_coins_small_desc: A quick pack to unlock skins.
shop_coins_big_desc: A lot of coins to progress faster.
shop_no_ads_desc: Removes interstitial ads. Rewarded videos stay optional.
shop_starter_desc: Coins, boosts, and an exclusive starter skin.
skins_subtitle: Change the style of your main monster.
rules_1: Watch the monster coming down the conveyor.
rules_2: Swipe left, center, or right to send it to the right portal.
rules_3: Correct answers increase your combo and score.
rules_4: Complete levels to earn coins and unlock skins.
modal_pause_text: You can resume the game or go back home.
modal_purchase_text: The base is ready. The real mobile store must be connected later.
modal_restore_text: The base is ready to restore purchases later.
